briefing.title: Break the satellite, then impersonate it

sections.p: DEMOSAT stays alive by keeping its solar panels pointed at the sun, held steady by reaction wheels. Its ground station trusts whatever telemetry beacon it hears.
You uplink adcs_torque with an abused value (999 mNm). The wheels overspin, the satellite tumbles, the panels lose the sun, and power collapses — the ground-station alarm fires.
A rogue drone impersonates DEMOSAT and replays a forged "healthy" beacon at the ground station. Every telemetry field is a lie: NOMINAL, battery 98%, sun-tracking, comm connected.
The dashboard believes the beacon and the alarm goes quiet — while the real satellite keeps tumbling and the physical motors never stop. The operator never sees the crisis.

briefing.ack: I understand I'll first break the satellite by uplink, then hide the damage by spoofing a forged healthy beacon.

extras.label: ④ DRONE SPOOF → HIDE THE ALARM
